blocks.label: Sandwich Panels
blocks.text:
The Supplier shall supply precast concrete sandwich panels:

Type: {{panelType}}
Construction: {{construction}}
Thickness: min {{totalThk}} mm
Insulation: {{insCore}}, min {{insThk}} mm
Ext leaf: min {{extLeaf}} mm
Int leaf: min {{intLeaf}} mm
Reinforcement: min {{rebar}} kg/m²

Exterior finish: {{extFinish}}, colour/aggregate: {{extCol}}
Interior: {{intFin}}
Min calc area: {{minCalc}} m²
Anchors: {{anchorType}}, {{anchorQty}}/panel

Confirm: type, U-value, fire class, DoP/CE, weight/m², max dimensions, concrete class.

STM reserves the right to reject non-compliant alternatives.

variables.label: Panel type
variables.delegateText: The Supplier shall propose a panel suitable for the application.

variables.label: Construction
variables.altText: The Supplier shall offer alternative constructions with U-value and price.

variables.label: Insulation
variables.altText: Offer alternative insulation: state fire class, U-value, price impact.

variables.label: Ext finish
variables.delegateText: Propose finish with samples for STM approval.

variables.label: Aggregate/colour
variables.delegateText: Propose aggregate. STM confirms on samples.

blocks.label: Openings & Cutouts
blocks.text:
Cutouts: {{cutQty}} pieces, std max {{cutMax}} m².
Per cutout: reinforcement at edges + dagkanten.
Dagkant: {{dagType}}.
Price: per cutout (std) and per m1 dagkant.

blocks.label: Surcharges
blocks.text:
State all surcharges:
- Non-standard height: per panel with thresholds
- Small panel: below {{smallThresh}} m²
- Special aggregate/colour
- Engineering costs

Surcharges not stated are deemed included.

blocks.label: Standards
blocks.text:
Comply with: EN 14992, EN 13369, EN 206, NEN-EN 1992-1-1.

Fire: EN 13501-1 min {{fireReact}}, EN 13501-2 min {{fireRes}}.
Thermal: max U-value {{uVal}} W/m²K.
Exposure: min {{expCl}}. Concrete: min {{concCl}}.

Attach: DoP, fire reports, concrete mix, thermal calc.

overrides.ch5_priceBreakdownItems:
Per m² per panel type
Per piece: anchors, dagkanten, cutouts
Per m1: dagkanten, plinths
Per load: transport

Includes: production, curing, QC, CE.
Surcharges: height, small panel, special aggregate, engineering, index.
overrides.ch6_exclusionItems:
- Erection/installation
- Steel substructure
- Crane
- Scaffolding
- Joint sealant
- Fire-stop at joints
- Surface treatment after install
- VAT
overrides.ch7_requiredDocuments:
1. Price schedule
2. Data sheets
3. DoP + CE
4. Fire reports
5. Concrete mix + exposure
6. Thermal calc
7. Lead time
8. Sample ref for finish
9. General terms
10. Deviations
